name: send_device_command
description: Send one or more control commands to a device to change its state. Commands use the device's data point codes (e.g., switch_led, bright_value, temp_set). Use get_device_status first to see available data points and their current values.

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the device to control.

parameters.name: commands
parameters.description: Array of command objects, each with a 'code' (data point name) and 'value' (new value to set).
